preliminary_conviction.note: Preliminary -- partial of section 6.3. Full version (HAC t-stat, OOS R^2, hit rate) requires Spec v5.

interpretation.narrative: The long-run and current-regime frames give partially conflicting valuation signals. Neither all-agreement nor a clean bubble-or-shift pattern; the variants split between regimes. Inspect each variant's z-scores and narrative_code individually.
